description.zh: 瑞士联邦是世界上最成功的直接民主范例：联邦委员会七人集体领导、轮值主席、州权自治、全民公投决定一切重大事务。从1291年三个森林州结盟开始，瑞士发展出了独特的政治文化——四种官方语言共存、永久武装中立、露天集会（Landsgemeinde）至今仍在部分州延续。这一制度证明了在高度多元化社会中，共识政治和公民直接参与是可行的。
description.en: The Swiss Confederation is the world's most successful example of direct democracy: a seven-member Federal Council with collective leadership, rotating presidency, cantonal autonomy, and referendums on all major issues. From the 1291 alliance of three forest cantons, Switzerland developed a unique political culture — four official languages coexisting, permanent armed neutrality, and open-air assemblies (Landsgemeinde) still practiced in some cantons. This system proves that consensus politics and direct citizen participation are viable in a highly diverse society.
